prompt: I'm building a 'Confirm Trade' modal dialog in React for my fantasy football app. When the user clicks 'Propose Trade', this modal pops up showing the trade details and two buttons: 'Send Offer' and 'Cancel'. What's the fully accessible implementation? I want the right HTML structure, ARIA attributes, keyboard behavior, and focus management.

assertions.text: Recommends <dialog> element OR role='dialog' with aria-modal='true'
Mentions aria-labelledby pointing to the dialog title
Covers focus trap — focus cycles within the modal
Mentions moving focus INTO the dialog on open
Mentions returning focus to trigger element on close
Covers Escape key closing the dialog
